title: potentilla angustiloba
intro: Potentilla angustiloba, also known as Chinese or narrow-leaved potentilla, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China and the Himalayas. It is a shrub with bright yellow or orange flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Potentilla angustiloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
